V0048_01_00_00_0.text: My Deck is the very definition of perfection!

V0048_01_00_01_0.text:
I predict that I'll win.
And even you know I'm right.

V0048_01_00_02_0.text:
It's your lucky day.
You get to lose by my hands.

V0048_01_00_03_0.text:
If you want to survive, just defeat me.
Simple, right?

V0048_01_00_04_0.text: Can you pose even a tiny bit of a challenge?

V0048_01_00_05_0.text:
I know exactly what you're planning.
I'll prove it to you.

V0048_01_00_06_0.text: You were nothing but another one of my father’s servants.

V0048_01_00_06_1.text: Solely brought in to motivate me!

V0048_01_00_07_0.text: Time to claim my position as the head of my father’s empire!

V0048_01_00_08_0.text: I'm the one who deserves to be the president of KaibaCorp!

V0048_01_00_09_0.text: When I win, even you'll have to admit I'm superior to you!

V0048_01_00_10_0.text:
You'll do anything for Seto.
But will he do the same?

V0048_01_00_11_0.text:
Mokuba, I'll take care of you.
In ways Seto never could.

V0048_01_00_12_0.text:
Sure, Yugi!
If you want to lose to me, so be it!

V0048_01_00_13_0.text:
Father!
How I longed to see you again!

V0048_03_00_00_0.text: I don't need to be a mind reader to know your strategies.

V0048_03_00_01_0.text: I'm counting down to your demise!

V0048_03_00_04_0.text: This is all part of my grand plan for a perfect victory.

V0048_03_00_05_0.text:
I'm impressed you've dealt me damage.
But I'm invincible!

V0048_05_00_00_0.text: I may be virtual, but my threats are real!

V0048_06_01_00_0.text: If you're going to do that...

V0048_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over the card I Set!

V0048_07_09_01_0.text: This is the card I Set!

V0048_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0048_16_00_00_0.text: You made a huge mistake by challenging me!

V0048_16_00_01_0.text: This will bring the Duel to a close!

V0048_21_00_00_0.text: Even a fool like you can see I'm clearly ahead.

V0048_21_00_01_0.text: How does it feel to know there's nothing you can do?

V0048_21_00_02_0.text: That brings my turn to an end!

V0048_21_00_03_0.text: If you don't start trying, this Duel will be over soon.

V0048_21_00_05_0.text: There has to be something I can do...

V0048_28_00_00_0.text: Just be happy that I didn't delete you from existence.

V0048_28_00_01_0.text: You really thought those attacks would work?

V0048_28_00_02_0.text: I was revived so I could rule above everyone and everything!

V0048_28_00_03_0.text: I can calculate more in a second than you can in a lifetime!

V0048_28_00_04_0.text:
Take your IQ and multiply it by a billion.
That's me!

V0048_28_00_05_0.text:
I'm not emotionless.
I just don't care about that nonsense.

V0048_28_00_06_0.text: You were only let into our house so you could train me!

V0048_28_00_07_0.text: Compared to me, you'll always be an orphan with no class.

V0048_28_00_08_0.text: I was supposed to inherit my father's empire - not you!

V0048_28_00_09_0.text:
Father! Did you watch?
This is why I'm your one true son!

V0048_28_00_10_0.text: Who needs Seto when you have me?

V0048_28_00_11_0.text:
Mokuba, stay here with me.
I'm your real brother.

V0048_28_00_12_0.text:
Father, did I make you proud?
Am I worthy of you?

V0048_28_00_13_0.text:
The Big Five!
You're out of a job!

V0048_29_00_02_0.text:
No one's on my side...
I'm all alone...
Is that why I lost?

V0048_29_00_04_0.text: Stop looking at me like that!

V0048_29_00_05_0.text: I'm a person - not a machine!

V0048_29_00_06_0.text: Is this the power of friendship?

V0048_29_00_07_0.text:
What's this aura I'm sensing...
Who are you!?

V0048_33_00_00_0.text: I'll show you my Deck Master's ability!

V0048_33_00_01_0.text: I created a Duel that's impossible to defeat!

V0048_33_00_02_0.text: I'll make you question every moment of your existence!

V0048_30_00_00_0.text:
Turn 1!
The rising waves sweep evil from the land!

V0048_30_00_01_0.text:
Turn 2!
Life evolves until dinosaurs rule the Earth!

V0048_30_00_02_0.text:
Turn 3!
A meteor shower cools the world into the Ice Age!

V0048_34_00_00_0.text:
Turn 4!
My Ark releases its power! 
Restoration of Life!

V0048_34_00_01_0.text:
Turn 5!
Cities grow and corporations control the world!

V0048_34_00_02_0.text:
Turn 6!
Mankind may continue to grow, but you'll go extinct!

V0048_34_00_03_0.text:
Turn 7!
I am now the most powerful being in the world!

V0048_34_00_04_0.text: KaibaCorp has the power to destroy the world if it wants to.

V0048_34_00_05_0.text: Pegasus learned about Spirit Monsters during his travels.

V0048_34_00_06_0.text: I predict this Duel won't last very long for you.

V0048_34_00_08_0.text: The more I see you struggle, the more I smile inside.

V0048_34_00_09_0.text: I'm your brother from now on.

V0048_34_00_10_0.text: You should be honored that I'll be in control of your body.

V0048_34_00_11_0.text: I'll fire my missiles to finish you - along with Duel Links!

V0048_32_00_00_0.text:
Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links
Let's live in this world together - forever.

V0048_32_00_01_0.text: The universe has evolved to its absolute peak with Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0048_35_00_00_0.text:
I'm Noah Kaiba.
Gozaburo Kaiba's one and only true son.

V0048_35_00_01_0.text: I'm the real president of KaibaCorp!

V0048_36_00_02_0.text: I should've just handled this on my own...

V0048_36_00_03_0.text: Listen... Our opponent's the bully who's been tormenting us.

V0048_08_00_00_0.text: I'll sail away with everything you have!

V0048_08_00_00_1.text:
I activate my Ritual Spell!
Shinato's Ark!

V0048_08_00_01_0.text:
I play my Continuous Spell!
Spiritual Energy Settle Machine!

V0048_08_00_01_1.text: Due to its effect, Spirit monsters remain on the field!

V0048_08_00_02_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Spring of Rebirth!

V0048_08_00_03_0.text: Due to Spring of Rebirth's effect, I regain LP!

V0048_08_00_04_0.text: The Equip Spell Card, Cyclon Laser!

V0048_08_00_05_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Sebek's Blessing!

V0048_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate the Spell, Dark Hole!
All monsters are destroyed!

V0048_08_00_07_0.text: Maybe I can make you feel differently using this card!

V0048_08_00_07_1.text:
My Spell Card!
Change of Heart!

V0048_08_00_08_0.text: Your monster has no place in my perfect world!

V0048_08_00_09_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Sword of Kusanagi!

V0048_08_00_10_0.text: Sword of Kusanagi returns to my hand!

V0048_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Equip Spell, Orb of Yasaka!

V0048_08_00_13_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Mirror of Yata!

V0048_08_00_14_0.text:
I activate the Spell, Fengsheng Mirror!
Show me your hand!

V0048_08_00_15_0.text:
I'm activating my Ritual Spell!
Shinobird's Calling!

V0048_08_00_16_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Shinobird Power Spot!

V0048_08_00_17_0.text: I activate Shinobird Power Spot's effect!

V0048_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Stars Align Above the Shrine!

V0048_08_00_19_0.text: I'll use Stars Align Above the Shrine to Ritual Summon!

V0048_08_00_20_0.text: I activate Stars Align Above the Shrine's effect!

V0048_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Ritual Spell!
Breath of Acclamation!

V0048_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Pyro Clock of Destiny!

V0048_08_00_22_1.text: This lets me move the turn count forward by 1!

V0048_08_00_23_0.text: Time for me to shake things up a bit!

V0048_08_00_23_1.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
The mighty Earthshaker!

V0048_08_00_24_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Spirit's Invitation!

V0048_08_00_26_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Legacy of Yata-Garasu!

V0048_08_00_27_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Shinobird Salvation!

V0048_08_00_29_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Stars Align across the Milky Way!

V0048_08_00_30_0.text: I'll use Stars Align across the Milky Way from my Graveyard!

V0048_09_00_00_0.text:
Shinato, King of a Higher Plane!
Judge this fool unworthy!

V0048_09_00_01_0.text: Tsumuha-Kutsunagi the Lord of Swords activates its effect!

V0048_09_00_09_0.text: Yamato-no-Kami comes back to my hand!

V0048_09_00_13_0.text: Dark Dust Spirit returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_14_0.text: Dark Dust Spirit activates its effect!

V0048_09_00_15_0.text:
Great Long Nose!
Return to my hand!

V0048_09_00_16_0.text: Great Long Nose activates its effect!

V0048_09_00_25_0.text: I activate Sakitama's effect from my hand!

V0048_09_00_27_0.text: Sakitama activates its effect when it's Tributed!

V0048_09_00_39_0.text:
Hebo, Lord of the River!
Activate your effect!

V0048_09_00_40_0.text:
Hebo, Lord of the River!
Return to my hand!

V0048_09_00_41_0.text: Fushi No Tori returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_42_0.text: Fushi No Tori's effect restores my LP!

V0048_09_00_43_0.text:
Inaba White Rabbit!
Hop on back!

V0048_09_00_47_0.text: I banish Konohanasakuya from my Graveyard to use her effect!

V0048_09_00_49_0.text:
Yata-Garasu!
Fly back to my hand!

V0048_09_00_55_0.text: Shinobaron Shade Peacock returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_57_0.text: Shinobaroness Shade Peacock returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_59_0.text: Shinobird Crane comes back to my hand!

V0048_09_00_61_0.text: Shinobird Crow returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_63_0.text: Shinobird Pigeon returns to my hand!

V0048_09_00_65_0.text: I activate Chiron the Mage's effect!

V0048_37_00_00_0.text: Prepare to experience the power of my real Deck Master!

V0048_13_00_00_0.text: The creator of all you see before you!

V0048_13_00_00_1.text: Shinato, King of a Higher Plane!

V0048_13_00_02_0.text:
My Spirit Monster!
Tsumuha-Kutsunagi the Lord of Swords!

V0048_13_00_08_0.text:
Check out my Spirit Monster!
Dark Dust Spirit!

V0048_13_00_09_0.text:
My Spirit Monster!
Great Long Nose!

V0048_13_00_10_0.text:
Here comes my Spirit Monster!
Susa Soldier!

V0048_13_00_22_0.text:
Here's my Spirit Monster!
Hebo, Lord of the River!

V0048_13_00_23_0.text: The Spirit Monster, Fushi No Tori!

V0048_13_00_24_0.text: Presenting my Spirit Monster, Inaba White Rabbit!

V0048_13_00_36_0.text: I Special Summon a Shinobird Token!

V0048_19_00_00_0.text:
Shinato, King of a Higher Plane!
Attack!

V0048_19_00_22_0.text:
Hebo, Lord of the River!
Attack!

V0048_19_00_36_0.text: I attack with my Shinobird Token!

V0048_19_00_41_0.text:
Gradius' Option!
Blast 'em with your lasers!

V0048_27_00_02_0.text: This can't be happening to me...
